title: Senior Engineer (Full Stack & AI/ML on GCP), AS
description:
Job Description:

Job Title- Senior Engineer (Full Stack & AI/ML on GCP), AS

Location- Pune, India

Role Description

We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Senior
Engineer to join our innovative team. In this pivotal role,
you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and
evolving our next-generation applications, leveraging a
full-stack approach with a strong emphasis on Google Cloud
Platform (GCP) and integrating cutting-edge Artificial
Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) capabilities.
You will provide technical guidance, mentor junior
engineers, and drive the adoption of best practices across
our development lifecycle.

What we’ll offer you

As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the
benefits that you’ll enjoy

- Best in class leave policy
- Gender neutral parental leaves
- 100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit
  (gender neutral)
- Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and
  education
- Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members
- Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your
  dependents
- Accident and Term life Insurance
- Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above

Your key responsibilities

- Contribute to architectural design and lead implementation
  of robust, scalable, and secure full-stack applications
  using Java Spring Boot, ReactJS/Angular, and
  Microservices.
- Design and implement cloud-native solutions on Google Cloud
  Platform (GCP), utilizing services for compute, storage,
  networking, data analytics, and AI/ML.
- Drive the integration of AI/ML offerings into applications,
  from concept to deployment, working with models, APIs, and
  frameworks.
- Lead and contribute to full-stack development, including
  front-end (ReactJS/Angular) and back-end (Java Spring
  Boot) components, REST APIs, and data models.
- Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior
  engineers, fostering innovation, continuous learning, and
  excellence. Review code and guide design decisions.
- Champion clean, secure, and efficient code practices,
  ensuring adherence to industry standards, security, and
  performance optimization.
- Partner with cross-functional and global teams to translate
  business requirements into technical solutions and solve
  complex software problems.
- Contribute to and improve CI/CD pipelines and deployment
  strategies, promoting automation and efficiency.
- Participate in L3 production support, providing expert
  analysis and resolution for complex issues, and
  contributing to root cause analysis.

Your skills and experience

- Extensive Full Stack Experience Proven experience designing,
  developing, and deploying enterprise-level full-stack
  applications using Java 8+ (Spring, Spring Boot,
  Hibernate) and modern JavaScript frameworks (ReactJS
  strongly preferred, Angular a plus).
- Microservices Architecture Deep understanding and practical
  experience with microservices architecture, including
  design patterns and API gateways.
- GCP Expertise Strong hands-on experience with Google Cloud
  Platform (GCP) services, including Compute Engine,
  Kubernetes Engine (GKE), Cloud Functions, Cloud SQL, Cloud
  Storage, BigQuery, Pub/Sub, Vertex AI, AI Platform.
- AI/ML Integration (1-2 Years Experience) Practical
  experience (1-2 years) integrating and leveraging AI/ML
  offerings within applications, including consuming AI/ML
  APIs, working with ML models, and understanding data
  pipelines for AI/ML. Python for AI/ML
  scripting/integration is a strong plus.
- Database Proficiency Expertise with relational databases
  (Oracle, PostgreSQL preferred) and/or NoSQL databases.
  Experience with Big Data technologies (Hadoop, Spark) is a
  plus.
- DevOps & Cloud Native Tools Solid experience with CI/CD
  pipelines, containerization (Docker), orchestration
  (Kubernetes, Helm Charts), and infrastructure as code
  (Terraform).
- API Design Solid understanding of RESTful API design
  principles, documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI), and testing
  platforms (Postman).
- Testing Frameworks Experience with unit testing (Junit),
  integration testing, and end-to-end testing methodologies.
- Operating Systems & Scripting Proficiency in Linux
  environments and shell scripting.
- Educational Background Bachelor’s degree in Computer
  Science, Information Systems, or a related field, or
  equivalent practical experience.

Skills That Will Help You Excel

- Architectural Understanding Ability to understand and
  contribute to robust, scalable, and maintainable
  architectural designs.
- Excellent Communication Superior written and verbal
  communication skills, able to articulate complex technical
  concepts to diverse audiences.
- Problem-Solving & Critical Thinking Exceptional problem-
  solving and critical thinking abilities, with a proactive
  approach to identifying and resolving technical
  challenges.
- Leadership & Mentorship Demonstrated ability to provide
  technical guidance and mentorship to junior team members.
- Security Mindset Strong understanding of security best
  practices and secure coding principles.
- Continuous Learner A self-starter with a passion for
  continuous learning and staying abreast of emerging
  technologies and industry trends.

How we’ll support you

- Training and development to help you excel in your career
- Coaching and support from experts in your team
- A culture of continuous learning to aid progression
- A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit
  your needs

About us and our teams

Please visit our company website for further information:

https://www.db.com/company/company.html

We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel
together every day. This includes acting responsibly,
thinking commercially, taking initiative and working
collaboratively.

Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people.
Together we are Deutsche Bank Group.

We welcome applications from all people and promote a
positive, fair and inclusive work environment.
responsibilities: Contribute to architectural design and lead implementation of robust, scalable, and secure full-stack applications using Java Spring Boot, ReactJS/Angular, and Microservices
Design and implement cloud-native solutions on Google Cloud Platform (GCP), utilizing services for compute, storage, networking, data analytics, and AI/ML
Drive the integration of AI/ML offerings into applications, from concept to deployment, working with models, APIs, and frameworks
Lead and contribute to full-stack development, including front-end (ReactJS/Angular) and back-end (Java Spring Boot) components, REST APIs, and data models
Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior engineers, fostering innovation, continuous learning, and excellence
Champion clean, secure, and efficient code practices, ensuring adherence to industry standards, security, and performance optimization
Partner with cross-functional and global teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions and solve complex software problems
Contribute to and improve CI/CD pipelines and deployment strategies, promoting automation and efficiency
use_cases: Enterprise-level full-stack applications for banking and financial services
Cloud-native solutions leveraging GCP services for compute, storage, networking, and data analytics
AI/ML-enabled applications through integration of pre-built AI services and APIs
Microservices-based architecture with API gateways for scalable banking solutions
Data-driven applications utilizing BigQuery and data pipelines for business intelligence
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role is primarily a full-stack engineering position
focused on building applications on GCP. While it involves
integrating AI/ML offerings (consuming APIs, working with
models), the description emphasizes using AI services rather
than building, training, or fine-tuning models. This falls
under ai-support as the engineer is working NEAR AI by
integrating AI capabilities into applications, not working
directly ON AI/ML systems.
